## What this changes

<!-- One paragraph. For normative changes, cite the spec section(s) and the Discussion where the change was proposed. -->

## Change class (spec §0.2)

- [ ] Editorial / errata (no normative effect)
- [ ] Additive — new optional field, wrapper, enum value, or profile (MINOR)
- [ ] Behavioral — verification-rule change gated by `spec_version`
- [ ] Hash/signature semantics (MAJOR — requires explicit maintainer sign-off)

## Checklist

- [ ] Every commit carries a DCO sign-off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] Claims about external protocols/network rules cite a primary source
- [ ] No vendor endorsements, partnership references, competitive rankings, or liability assertions
- [ ] Changelog (spec Appendix D) updated for normative changes
- [ ] Test vectors updated or explicitly marked not-affected
